creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, thanks!  The port also required a few stylistic tweaks before 
importing - nothing major, but you might want to have a look at "portlint" in 
the ports collection for your next port as it will help to create a port 
which conforms to all the various style guide rules.  Thanks!
